title: الخطة_التشغيلية_المحدثة_الأخيرة - Single Source of Truth Schema
description: Reverse-engineered 1:1 schema from actual workbook inspection (openpyxl). 8 sheets = 8 strategic goals. 3 distinct column layouts (variant_A, variant_B, variant_C). No formulas exist anywhere in the file.

header_rows.description: Rows 1-3 are header rows on every sheet; data starts at row 4

variant.description: variant_A = sheet 'الهدف الأول' only (split budget cols, no execution-cost col). variant_B = sheets 2,3,5,6,7,8 (single budget col + execution-cost col + baseline col). variant_C = sheet 'الهدف الرابع' only (like variant_B but WITHOUT baseline column).

rows.description: Each element = one raw data row (row >= 4) exactly as stored, before any hierarchy forward-fill.

strategic_goal.description: Column A. Merged across ALL data rows in the sheet in every observed case (one goal per sheet).

sub_goal.description: Column B. Merged across a contiguous block of rows (one or more initiatives).

initiative.description: Column C, merged across a contiguous row block, generally the same block as columns D-N (efficiency/effectiveness KPIs, department, budget, timeframe, quarters). This block may equal, or be narrower than, the sub_goal block.

المبادرة الاستراتيجية.description: Literal header includes a trailing space in the source file.

المستهدف__efficiency.description: Literal header is 'المستهدف' (col E) - suffixed here only to disambiguate from the other two 'المستهدف' columns in this schema; the raw column header text is identical ('المستهدف') in the source file.
المستهدف__efficiency.note: MIXED TYPE observed. Numeric (0-1, displayed as 0% percent format) in most rows; TEXT in sheets 5, 6, 8 e.g. '+50', '5% – 10%', 'تحقيق التزام بالموازنة لا يقل عن 90%'. Do not coerce silently.

المستهدف__effectiveness.note: Same mixed-type anomaly as efficiency target.

department.description: Literal header is 'الإدارة / القسم' in sheets 1,2,3,4 and 'القطاع / الإدارة' in sheets 5,6,7,8 — different literal text, kept as-is per sheet.
department.note: Sheet 6 row 16 (H16) contains TWO department names separated by a newline in a single cell: 'مكتب الحوكمة والالتزام\nمكتب المراجعة الداخلية'.

oneOf.description: variant_A only (sheet 'الهدف الأول'): TWO columns (I, J) both headed 'ميزانية المبادرة'.

ميزانية المبادرة__I.note: ANOMALY: sometimes numeric budget amount, sometimes the literal text 'مكة' (a location label) instead of a number, inconsistently within the same column.

ميزانية المبادرة__J.note: ANOMALY: sometimes numeric budget amount, sometimes the literal text 'المدينة', sometimes empty.

النطاق الزمني لتنفيذ المبادرة.note: Free text combining a number and a unit, e.g. '26 أسبوع', '52 أسبوعًا'. Not a raw number.

quarters.description: 4 columns under header 'المخطط الزمني لتنفيذ المبادرة' > 'الربع 1'..'الربع 4'.

quarter_flag.note: ANOMALY: three visually-similar but distinct Unicode checkmark glyphs are used across sheets: '✔︎' (U+2714 U+FE0E) in sheet 1, '✔' (U+2714) in sheets 2-4, '✓' (U+2713) in sheets 5-8. Must be normalized to a single boolean before use.

operational_project.description: Column O (variant_B/C) or P (variant_A). Merge span can equal the initiative block, be a sub-block (project spans multiple KPI rows), or be unmerged (one row = one project).

تكلفة التنفيذ.note: COLUMN DOES NOT EXIST in variant_A (sheet 'الهدف الأول'). Present in variant_B and variant_C.

project_kpi.description: Finest granularity: one un-merged data row = one measurement indicator for one project.

المستهدف__kpi.description: Literal header is 'المستهدف' (col R, or col Q in variant_A).

خط الأساس\nالمنجز في 2025.note: COLUMN DOES NOT EXIST in variant_C (sheet 'الهدف الرابع').

monthly_entry.description: One of 12 repeating blocks under super-header 'المستهدف الشهري', sub-headed by month name (يناير..ديسمبر), each with 4 literal sub-columns.

المستهدف.note: ANOMALY in sheets 5 and 8: some cells contain non-numeric codes like '6M', '5M', '3M', '7M', '4M' with no explanation elsewhere in the workbook. Do not infer meaning.

التحديات.note: Mostly empty. Sheet 'الهدف الأول' contains non-breaking-space characters (U+00A0) as a placeholder instead of a true empty/NULL cell in this column.

raw_row.description: Verbatim representation of a single physical spreadsheet row (row_number >= 4), with hierarchy columns (A,B,C) possibly null because the visual value only exists on the first row of its merge range in the source file. Consumers must forward-fill using merges_report.json, not assume every row repeats the value.

cells.description: Keyed by literal column letter (A, B, C, ... BO), value = raw cell value with native type as read by openpyxl (str/int/float/None). No renaming, no trimming, no coercion applied at this layer.
